channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: Iranian Hackers Attack U.S. Company Stryker in Escalation of Cyber War
item.description: Operations at Stryker, a U.S.-based global medical technology company, were hobbled after a massive cyberattack on its Microsoft environment reportedly wiped devices running Windows, an incident for which an Iranian threat group claimed responsibility. Handala, linked to Iran’s Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC), in a message on Telegram, said that Stryker offices in at least 79 countries were hit March 11 by the nation-state threat group, which claimed to have erased data from more than 200,00...
